name: forge-vscode
description: Local-first AI for Ollamax — Chat (Ask, read-only) and an autonomous Agent (tools, memory, skills, file edits), all on your own hardware via local Ollama. No cloud, no API keys, no telemetry.

commands.title: Ollamax: Add Active File to Chat
Ollamax: Sign in with GitHub (device code)
Ollamax: Voice — navigate to code by speaking

forge.serverPath.description: Path to the `forge` binary. Defaults to `forge` on your PATH. Set this to e.g. /abs/path/to/target/release/forge if it isn't installed.

forge.serverPort.description: If greater than 0, connect to an already-running `forge serve` on this port instead of launching one. Leave at 0 to have the extension launch and manage its own backend on an OS-assigned port.

forge.serverToken.description: Required only with forge.serverPort: the private FORGE_SERVER_TOKEN for that already-running local server. It is sent only to 127.0.0.1 and is never logged. Leave blank when Ollamax manages the server.

forge.autoStartServer.description: Automatically launch `forge serve` when the chat panel opens.

forge.statusWhimsy.description: Show playful, rotating 'thinking' status words (Discombobulating…, Ruminating…) while a response is in flight. Turn off for a plain 'Working…' indicator. Honors the OS reduced-motion preference automatically.

forge.accountServer.description: Base URL of the Ollamax account server for sign-in, the Hub, and the usage dashboard (e.g. https://your-app.vercel.app, or http://localhost:3000 for local dev). Leave blank to disable account features. Never used for inference; your code never goes here.

forge.telemetry.description: Send anonymous usage METADATA (counts, model/provider, token counts, language by file extension) to power your web usage dashboard. NEVER sends prompts, code, file contents, file paths, or repo names. Turn off to send nothing. Requires being signed in.

forge.webTools.description: Let the model use the free web tools (search / Wikipedia / arXiv / fetch URL) during normal chat — it decides when to look things up. PRIVACY: inference stays local, but your search queries and the text of fetched pages leave your machine (to those services). Off = pure-local chat.

forge.whisperPath.description: Path to a local whisper.cpp CLI binary, used by Voice navigation for ON-DEVICE speech-to-text. Audio never leaves your machine. Install whisper.cpp and set this if it isn't on your PATH.

forge.whisperModel.description: Path to a whisper.cpp ggml model (e.g. ggml-base.en.bin) for Voice navigation. Required to enable voice. Download once from the whisper.cpp model repo; transcription runs locally.
